title: Easy Covid LAMP
steps: Insert sample transfer plastic into the sample tube, mix for 5 seconds, then insert into pre-filled 0.2ml master mix PCR tube, mix for 5 seconds, discard.
Place PCR tube on the pre-heated heat block device and run . 65 °C, (Heat block is pre-set) 00:29:00
Check the color of the PCR tube with naked eye: positive if yellow, negative if pink or orange.
Optional: Check the fluorescence signal using handheld fluorescent viewer: positive if bright green, negative if matte green.
creator: ahmet
